caption: A person is preparing a liquid mixture in a large metal pot on a white stovetop. A candy thermometer is placed vertically in the pale yellow liquid, with a hand visible at the top holding the device. To the left, a small inset video shows a woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark t-shirt, who is pouring something from a small metal pitcher into a separate container in a kitchen setting. The main scene includes a red measuring cup sitting on the stove next to the pot and a colorful striped cloth hanging to the right. As the sequence progresses, the liquid in the pot remains still while the person continues to hold the thermometer. In the inset video, the woman continues her pouring action. There is no legible on-screen text or logos present in any of the frames.
